title: IHKFILAN Satin Ribbon in Royal Blue (38 mm x 22.86 m) Matt Shiny Gift Ribbon for Decorating & Crafts, Weddings, Christenings
features: QUALITY: Made of polyester, double, soft, luxurious satin ribbon. Which is made of a sturdy material. The color not pull away. These tapes are machine washable. Smooth and silky surface without wrinkles. You don't need to iron them before use
MULTIPLE COLOR: green、white、black、red、moss、orange、golden brown, all ribbon rolls are a combination of softness and shine

CRAFT ACCESSORIES: 38 mm x 22.86 m per roll, polyester fabric tape. Both sides are covered with a circular cardboard. The outer roll is protected by a plastic tape. It can be stored easily and prevents fraying and soiling

WIDE USE: The satin ribbon with the combination of softness and shine. It can be found on box packaging, wedding decorations, party decorations, hair braids, baby decorations, and much more. It's also for sewing projects
Ribbons: Multicoloured ribbons all kinds of packaging, whether for a birthday, christening, communion, Christmas, anniversary or wedding day, Beautiful ribbons can add a unique color to you
description: Product Description IHKFILAN Double Face Satin Ribbon Double side satin ribbon 100% Polyester, double side soft ribbons. DIY Great to embellish favor boxes, gifting bags, cards embellishment, gift-wrapping, tie tags, Flower Bouquet, etc Gift wrapping Great for sewing projects, gift wrapping, invitation embellishments and all crafting projects. multiple colors More than 24 colors of IHKFILAN satin ribbon for your different needs.
